title: verbascum alpigenum
intro: Verbascum alpigenum, also known as alpine mullein, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Its medicinal properties lie in its leaves and flowers, which contain mucilages, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Verbascum alpigenum include soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
